text:
There once was a little girl named Lucy who lived deep in the forest. She loved adventures. One day, while exploring, she stumbled upon a clearing bathed in moonlight. In the middle lay a beautiful white owl perched silently.

Curious, Lucy approached slowly. Suddenly, the owl spread its wings and fluttered upward with an eerie grace. Lucy couldnopenhanded.

Then—

The owl spoke. "Many fair tales wander into my realm.”

"And?", Lucy asked.

"Just a wise owl. Remember this moonlight? It whispers secrets."

Now curiouser than ever, Lucy stayed listening.

"The greatest tale is yours," the owl continued.

"You?"

"The courage to dream."

That night, Lucy slept with owl wings unfolded beside her. In dreams, she soared through forests battling fears. When dawn came, she woke feeling strong.

From that day onwards, Lucy winged her way through challenges with bravery. The woods loved her. And the owl? It became her guardian.

So listen well
